rules: Prefer primary sources, court records, official releases, archives, and dated reporting.
Do not treat a news mention as proof of wrongdoing.
Every item must keep a source URL, source label, date, lane, and reader route.
Every update should connect to evidence, video, opt-in, offer, and book/store routes where relevant.

items.title: Epstein Evidence Watch activated
items.summary: The Epstein lane is configured for source-watch updates, document routes, dated bulletins, video routes, opt-ins, offers, and book/store pathways.
